case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF VS. MARY'S HELP, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,711.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MARY'S HELP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 91.00 SERVED NOV-28-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARY'S HELP, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT MARY'S HELP, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARY'S HELP, INC. $2,168.56 PRINCIPAL, $91.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,259.56, DEFENDANT MAY MAKE PAYMENT AS SET OUT BELOW. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $500.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON FEB-15-2019 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT MARY'S HELP, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY REPRESENTED JOSEPH QUARTELL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARY'S HELP, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED ROY AND VIVI SMALLY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
